issues.title: How to Integrate RedisVectorStore with RedissonConnectionFactory
issues.body: Please do a quick search on GitHub issues first, the feature you are about to request might have already been requested. **Expected Behavior** I hope to be able to use RedisVectorStore with other RedisConnectionFactory implementations as well. **Current Behavior** I have noticed that the current instantiation of RedisVectorStore uses JedisConnectionFactory from the container. However, my project uses RedissonConnectionFactory, which cannot retrieve the required parameters for the instantiation of RedisVectorStore.
